title: uralepis cuprea
intro: Uralepis cuprea, also known as copper-uralepis, is a plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae, native to the tropical regions of the world. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Uralepis cuprea include treating wounds, skin infections, and respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its antimicrobial and expectorant properties. Herbal preparations of Uralepis cuprea are often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat fever and digestive issues.
